category_sources: source_facts.description says it manipulates structured data definitions; MetaCPAN SQL::Translator docs describe converting vendor-specific SQL table definitions into other formats.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository describes the project as SQL::Translator (SQLFairy); MetaCPAN documentation title is SQL::Translator.
docs_sources: MetaCPAN SQL::Translator page is official CPAN module documentation and says the manual covers general module and script use.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL https://github.com/dbsrgits/sql-translator; MetaCPAN project metadata links Repository to GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and MetaCPAN docs identify structured SQL definition conversion; source_facts.executables lists sqlt command-line tools; GitHub repository language is Perl.
